creator: ade@FreeBSD.org
text:
A few things about this:

  1.  we already have an (albeit old) BitchX IRC client in
      ${PORTSDIR}/irc/bitchx  -- have you contacted the maintainer
      of that port <griffin@blackhole.iceworld.org> regarding
      an update

  2.  looking at suggested master site, I see only 'c14' and 'c15'
      versions of the software

-aDe

-- 
Ade Lovett, Austin, TX.
